criteria.description: CLAUDE.md and MEMORY.md root exist and parse coherently (single-brand).
Levels N0-N4 present with seeds P00/P01/P02 each having a local CLAUDE.md.
criteria.pass_if: all five levels and three seeds materialized

criteria.description: Zero preexisting files overwritten unless --force was explicit.
criteria.pass_if: overwrite count == 0 in missing-only; diffs reviewed if --force

criteria.description: Bootstrap report lists every artifact with state and absolute path.
criteria.pass_if: each artifact has state in {creado, omitido, sobrescrito} and absolute path

criteria.description: Every non-trivial claim carries a Jarvis OS family tag (not Alfa).
criteria.pass_if: tags present and from the Jarvis OS family

criteria.description: A second missing-only run yields zero creations.

gate: all criteria must pass; green without evidence is not success
